inputFieldTemplates.name: Location

inputFieldTemplates.name: MilitaryMight
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineSelect(option(1, No guards & no defenses—open to bandits.), option(2, A handful of militia with pitchforks & barely trained.), option(4, Small town watch & simple wooden palisade.), option(6, Local militia with some training and basic weapons.),  option(8, Standing town guard & modest defenses but vulnerable.),  option(10, Well-maintained guard & reliable city walls & standard garrison.),  option(12, Disciplined army with organized leadership and equipment.),  option(14, Regional military power—knights & war machines & fortresses.),  option(16, Feared army & professional corps & navy or air support.), option(18, Recognized as a military superpower & veterans of many wars.), option(20, Legendary army; unmatched in the region.), option(22, Empire’s military backbone & war engines & massive fleets.), option(24, Commands multi-regional armies & elite magical units.), option(26, Global superpower & military dominance unquestioned.), option(28, World-conquering force & feared across continents.), option(30, Mythic host—divine champions & planar armies & could wage war on gods.))]

inputFieldTemplates.name: Infrastructure
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineSelect(option(1, Dirt paths & no sanitation & frequent collapse of buildings.), option(2, Few usable roads & disorganized layout & no reliable transport.), option(4, Some basic streets and wells but poor upkeep.), option(6, A few decent bridges & basic sewers & small-scale irrigation.),  option(8, Organized streets & modest roads & and basic utilities.),  option(10, Standard stone roads & aqueducts & stable housing districts.),  option(12, Well-designed city planning & trade routes efficient.),  option(14, Advanced road networks & harbors & clean water & waste management.),  option(16, Architectural marvels & thriving transport systems & multi-level districts.), option(18, Engineering feats—colossal aqueducts & magical transit & flawless upkeep.), option(20, Flawless planning & wonders of the world.), option(22, Multiple megastructures & seamless transport.), option(24, Infrastructure integrates magic. example - teleport hubs & levitating highways), option(26, City functions like a living organism & no inefficiency.), option(28, Reality-defying designs. example - floating districts & weather control), option(30, Perfected utopia of infrastructure; perhaps planar or divine.))]

inputFieldTemplates.name: PublicHealth
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineSelect(option(1, Constant famine & rampant plague & population collapsing.), option(2, Severe malnutrition & dirty water & high mortality.), option(4, Occasional famine & sickness common & poor sanitation.), option(6, Adequate food but vulnerable to outbreaks.),  option(8, Decent nutrition & basic sanitation & occasional sickness.),  option(10, Reliable food and water supply & manageable health issues.),  option(12, Good sanitation & stable harvests & organized healers.),  option(14, Abundant food & clean water & public health programs.),  option(16, Rarely faces epidemics & longevity and vitality common.), option(18, Nearly immune to plagues/famine & advanced healing practices.), option(20, Near-utopian health.), option(22, Disease eradicated & lifespans doubled.), option(24, Citizens rarely fall ill & injuries healed instantly.), option(26, Immortality possible for most; magical or alchemical advances.), option(28, No famine & no death from natural causes; only violence can harm.), option(30, God-touched people—immortal & ageless & immune to all sickness.))]

inputFieldTemplates.name: EducationMagic
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineSelect(option(1, No written records & superstition dominates.), option(2, Oral tradition only & very limited scholarly thought.), option(4, Few scribes & little organized learning & magic feared.), option(6, Basic literacy & local hedge-wizards or apprentices.),  option(8, Schools and libraries exist & modest arcane guilds.),  option(10, Colleges & wizards towers & and educated artisans are common.),  option(12, Thriving intellectual culture & magical research supported.),  option(14, Universities and magical academies; innovative ideas spread.),  option(16, Hub of scholarship & magical breakthroughs frequent.), option(18, Global leader in knowledge and arcane mastery.), option(20, Legendary intellectual/magical capital.), option(22, Breakthroughs that reshape regions. example - teleportation & artificing), option(24, Schools producing archmages as a matter of course.), option(26, Research brushes against divine secrets.), option(28, Settlements that rewrite the rules of reality. example - new planes & laws of magic), option(30, Mythic hub—library of all existence & where gods themselves seek wisdom.))]

inputFieldTemplates.name: EconomicStability
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineSelect(option(1, Collapsing economy & famine & trade dead & widespread theft.), option(2, Massive debt & unstable currency & regular riots.), option(4, Barely surviving & wealth hoarded by a few & corruption rampant.), option(6, Modest trade & high inequality & fragile markets.),  option(8, Stable but vulnerable economy & simple coinage and trade.),  option(10, Balanced taxes & reliable trade & comfortable prosperity.),  option(12, Growing wealth & fair taxation & robust guild networks.),  option(14, Thriving economy & strong merchant class & vibrant markets.),  option(16, Regional trade hub & exports drive prosperity.), option(18, Global economic power & rich coffers & stable wealth.), option(20, Legendary prosperity.), option(22, Currency accepted globally & vast reserves of wealth.), option(24, Markets dictate world politics; vast mercantile empire.), option(26, Wealth defies scarcity—resources seem inexhaustible.), option(28, Economic control across planes & astral trade routes.), option(30, Infinite prosperity—city literally never wants for anything.))]

inputFieldTemplates.name: Diplomacy
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineSelect(option(1, Universally hated & constant rebellions & pariah state.), option(2, Hostile relations & xenophobic & prone to war.), option(4, Distrusted & poor reputation & few allies.), option(6, Neutral but aloof & occasional alliances.),  option(8, Decent reputation & reliable relations with neighbors.),  option(10, Stable treaties & fair leadership & respected locally.),  option(12, Regional influence & charismatic leaders & allies drawn to them.),  option(14, Skilled diplomats & well-liked & cultural soft power.),  option(16, International respect & strong alliances & admired abroad.), option(18, Great diplomatic power & shape global politics.), option(20, Legendary reputation.), option(22, Cultural beacon; empires revolve around its approval.), option(24, Mediator of the world; wars stop when it speaks.), option(26, Revered even by enemies; influence crosses planes.), option(28, Cultural gravity pulls in gods & demons & and nations alike.), option(30, Mythic influence—its mere existence holds the multiverse in balance.))]

inputFieldTemplates.name: SettlementTraits
inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inlineSelect(option(Fortified Walls), option(Trade Hub), option(Grand Academy), option(Veteran Army), option(Cultural Magnet), option(Sacred Wells), option(Arcane Nexus), option(Merchant Princes), option(City of Artisans), option(Divine Favor), option(Mercenary Contract), option(Hidden Vaults), option(Iron Discipline), option(Revolutionary Spirit), option(Harbor of Storms), option(Circle of Venterri))]

inputFieldTemplates.declaration: INPUT[inclineSelect(option(str, Strength), option(dex, Dexterity), option(con, Constitution), option(int, Intelligence), option(wis, Wisdom), option(cha, Charisma))]
